target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit SQL Server-only brackets, GO batches, or session settings.

unsupported_object_types.table: SQL Server table extraction is not implemented in this tool yet. Skip table migration from SQL Server or add deterministic extraction support first.
unsupported_object_types.trigger: Snowflake does not support SQL Server-style table triggers directly. Convert them manually to a Snowflake stream/task/procedure pattern.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for Snowflake in this tool.

view: Convert SQL Server view syntax to valid Snowflake view syntax.
storedprocedure: Convert SQL Server procedure syntax to valid Snowflake procedure syntax without introducing placeholder database names.
function: Convert SQL Server function syntax to valid Snowflake function syntax.
sequence: Convert SQL Server sequences to valid Snowflake CREATE SEQUENCE syntax when present.
synonym: Convert SQL Server synonyms only when they can be represented safely in Snowflake; otherwise prefer a deterministic skip.
